text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What tremendous cheers. So this is the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe Daiwa Scarlet's racing today?
This is gonna be so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Who else is here... Oh, Air Shakur? Huh, I didn't
know she was still racing.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She was great in her classic year, but I haven't
heard her name come up at all this year. All
anyone remembers is that she was the Double
Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Every racer reaches their peak eventually. But
claiming the Double Crown is still pretty amazing.
She should have just finished her career then.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Right? She could have gone out as a legend.
Anyway, who else is racing?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's okay. Shakur's not going to lose.
choice_data_list:
Honestly, today's race is going to be tough for
her.

Honestly, today's race is going to be tough for
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not as extreme as the spectators make it out
to be, but Air Shakur has been in a slump
recently. A comeback is certainly possible, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I know. But she won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You won't... Right, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's says it quietly, almost like a
prayer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen begins in a cacophony of cheers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for the result...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I couldn't agree more.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet was as incredible as I expected. And as for
Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She was the picture of pride, defying her fate
until the very last second.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And now... she'll move forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I snap to attention at those words, and my brow
furrows in confusion. From what I've heard, Air
Shakur is finished racing.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what Shakur plans to do, but I think
she'll keep fighting.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After all, her expression at the end... It was the
face she makes when she's calculating her way to
victory. I love that face.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching her race for a long time now,
so I know that face better than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And... I'm sure that's the face Shakur wanted me
to see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I have to go.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Wait!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: C'mon, I know you felt something.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You saw me struggle out there, and you're still
gonna quit?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Let's go, Trainer. It's almost time for the press
conference.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right after this race, we have a scheduled press
conference... where Fine Motion will announce
her return to Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Shakur. I've made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But please believe me when I say that your race
was truly wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I guess it's no good. I knew nothing would change!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, Fine. I get it. This is the end—game
over.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I knew from the start how this would play out. I
knew I'd lose here and that would be the end of
the road for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But where's the fun in that? So I kept searching
for something—anything that could change that
result.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And that's when I found you, Fine. You were
different. At first, all I cared about was getting
some unique data and analyzing it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But then, one day... you defied my predictions. In
that moment, a thought crossed my mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: "If anyone can change their fate, it's her."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought if I could get you to keep running—to
defy your destiny—then that would prove that my
fate could change as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So I put my faith in a dumb hypothesis and clung to it... like an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And in the end... everything went exactly as I
predicted.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Gotta be honest with you, though... I'm not too mad about it. Why? Nothing's changed, so I should be pissed, but I'm not.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It sounds to me like you're satisfied with your
journey. You made it your own.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And you? Are you truly satisfied with your
journey?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm very fortunate, aren't I? I'm a truly, truly
blessed individual.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I ran so much, made so many lovely friends, and
heard the glorious sound of countless cheers.
choice_data_list:
No one's going to forget the impact you've
made.

No one's going to forget the impact you've
made.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right. I'm sure they'll all remember me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And I believe it'll be a dazzling memory.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Fine!
Don't quit! Keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all so much. However, I must bring
these wonderful three years to a close.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This exquisite ending has been decided from the
very start.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Every race has a beginning and an end. But in our
memories, it becomes more than a simple
contest...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And as long as none of you forget me, I'll live on
in your memories.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So please, allow me to stay... within your hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's eyes glisten with a rare sadness as
she smiles.
